title: Spark Program Units
description: Defines the navigation menu structure for a MintPlayer Spark application. Program units are grouped into categories and link to queries or persistent objects. Place this file at App_Data/programUnits.json.

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema reference for editor IntelliSense.

programUnitGroups.description: Top-level navigation groups. Each group contains related program units.

TranslatedString.description: A translated string where keys are ISO language codes (e.g., 'en', 'fr', 'nl') and values are the translated text.

ProgramUnitGroup.description: A navigation group that contains related program units. Rendered as a collapsible section in the sidebar.

id.description: Unique identifier (GUID) for this program unit group.

name.description: Translated display name for the group.

icon.description: Icon class name for the group (e.g., 'bi-truck' for Bootstrap Icons).

order.description: Sort order of the group in the navigation. Lower numbers appear first.

programUnits.description: The program units (menu items) within this group.

ProgramUnit.description: A single navigation item that links to a query result list or a persistent object view.

id.description: Unique identifier (GUID) for this program unit.

name.description: Translated display name for the menu item.

icon.description: Icon class name for the menu item (e.g., 'bi-car-front-fill', 'bi-people').

type.description: The type of target this program unit navigates to.

queryId.description: The GUID of the SparkQuery to display when type is 'query'.

persistentObjectId.description: The GUID of the EntityTypeDefinition to display when type is 'persistentObject'.

order.description: Sort order of the program unit within its group. Lower numbers appear first.

alias.description: URL-friendly alias for this program unit's route (e.g., 'cars', 'people').
